'''âj-t-s-n''' ('''kajatsenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cease|cease]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cease|cease]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-t-s-n
|-
! Lemma
| kajatsenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijatsenoko|thijatsenoko]] || [[word:jijatsenoko|jijatsenoko]] || [[word:shijatsenoko|shijatsenoko]] || [[word:kijatsenoko|kijatsenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujatsenoko|thuthujatsenoko]] || [[word:jujujatsenoko|jujujatsenoko]] || [[word:shushujatsenoko|shushujatsenoko]] || [[word:kukujatsenoko|kukujatsenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujatsenoko|thujatsenoko]] || [[word:jujatsenoko|jujatsenoko]] || [[word:shujatsenoko|shujatsenoko]] || [[word:kujatsenoko|kujatsenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojatsenoko|thothojatsenoko]] || [[word:jojojatsenoko|jojojatsenoko]] || [[word:shoshojatsenoko|shoshojatsenoko]] || [[word:kokojatsenoko|kokojatsenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojatsenoko|thojatsenoko]] || [[word:jojatsenoko|jojatsenoko]] || [[word:shojatsenoko|shojatsenoko]] || [[word:kojatsenoko|kojatsenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojatsenoko|thojatsenoko]] || [[word:jojatsenoko|jojatsenoko]] || [[word:shojatsenoko|shojatsenoko]] || [[word:kojatsenoko|kojatsenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjatsenoko|thĂŠjatsenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjatsenoko|jĂŠjatsenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjatsenoko|shĂŠjatsenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjatsenoko|kĂŠjatsenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajatsenoko|thathajatsenoko]] || [[word:jajajatsenoko|jajajatsenoko]] || [[word:shashajatsenoko|shashajatsenoko]] || [[word:kakajatsenoko|kakajatsenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajatsenoko|thajatsenoko]] || [[word:jajatsenoko|jajatsenoko]] || [[word:shajatsenoko|shajatsenoko]] || [[word:kajatsenoko|kajatsenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajatsenoko|thajatsenoko]] || [[word:jajatsenoko|jajatsenoko]] || [[word:shajatsenoko|shajatsenoko]] || [[word:kajatsenoko|kajatsenoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
